docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,810.87 FILED BY ROSSINI VIDEO GROUP DBA COMTEL VIDEO PRODUCTS AS TO DEFENDANT MODERN MEDIA VENTURES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSSINI VIDEO GROUP DBA COMTEL VIDEO PRODUCTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODERN MEDIA VENTURES, INC. $1,810.87 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,870.87, JUDGMENT ARISES FROM SMALL CLAIMS CASE # 97S00309, IN BURBANK DIST, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES 6/16/97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ROBERT D. LEWIS PRES. MODERN MEDIA VENTURES INC. HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-1998 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
FAXED PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION & SUBPENA DUCES TECUM FILED UPON THE INSISTENCE OF THE PLTF.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-02-1998, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY ROBERT D. LEWIS PRES. MODERN MEDIA VENTURES INC.
